claim_boundary: Tier 7.0e is software benchmark evidence only. It reruns the public standard dynamical scoreboard with v2.2 and a length sweep. It is not hardware evidence, not a custom synthetic usefulness claim, not a new baseline freeze, and not AGI/ASI evidence.

nonclaims: not language, planning, AGI, or ASI
classification.recommendation: Do not blame short length alone; diagnose readout/recurrent/interface gap.

criteria.name: raw v2.1 reference policy
criteria.rule: required in full_diagnostic; historical-only in scoreboard

fairness_contract.custom_task_policy: no custom synthetic tasks in this runner
fairness_contract.hardware_policy: software-only; hardware transfer blocked until benchmark/mechanism earns it
fairness_contract.long_run_policy: scoreboard mode omits raw CRA trace collection and destructive shams so 10k/50k public benchmark sweeps remain practical; use full_diagnostic mode for shorter mechanism-causality audits.
fairness_contract.normalization: train-prefix only inside imported task builders and online readouts
fairness_contract.prediction: online readouts predict before update; train-prefix baselines fit only train rows
fairness_contract.scoreboard: Mackey-Glass / Lorenz / NARMA10 standard dynamical suite
fairness_contract.tier: Tier 7.0e - Standard Dynamical Benchmark Rerun With v2.2 And Run-Length Sweep

tier: Tier 7.0e - Standard Dynamical Benchmark Rerun With v2.2 And Run-Length Sweep
